parameters.jsCode:
): ${productNames}`, preResolved.productName),
  `- natureOfProblem: ${preResolved.natureOfProblem ? `CONFIRMED = "${preResolved.natureOfProblem}" — return this exact value` : `string or null — MUST be chosen verbatim from this list:\n${natureList}`}`,
  `- description: ${preResolved.description ? `CONFIRMED = "${preResolved.description}" — return this exact value` : 'string — 2-3 sentence professional summary of the complaint'}`,
  '- quantity: number — number of units/assets mentioned (default 1 if not specified)',
  '- selectedTemplateId: number — ID of the best matching template',
  '- selectedTemplateName: string',
  '- alreadyProvided: object mapping field names to their confirmed values',
  '- missingFromTemplate: array of field name strings that are still missing',
  '- isComplete: boolean — set true ONLY when BOTH storeCode AND employeeCode are present. Otherwise false.',
  '- suggestedReply: empty string "" if isComplete is true. If missing storeCode or employeeCode, format the reply EXACTLY like this (use actual newlines):',
  '  Dear SM,',
  '  ',
  '  Thank you for reaching out. To register your complaint, kindly share the following:',
  '  ',
  '  [list only the missing P1 fields as bullet lines starting with •]',
  '  ',
  '  Please reply at the earliest so we can log and assign the complaint.',
  '  ',
  '  Regards,',
  '  VMM Helpdesk Team',
  '  Open Mind Services Limited',
].join('\n');

const userContent = [
  '=== AVAILABLE TEMPLATES ===',
  templateSummary,
  '',
  '=== EMAIL THREAD (full conversation) ===',
  `From: ${body.fromEmail || ''}`,
  `Subject: ${body.subject || ''}`,
  `Store hint from sender email domain: ${body.storeCode || 'Unknown'}`,
  '',
  plainText,
].join('\n');

const openaiBody = {
  model: 'gpt-4o-mini',
  max_tokens: 1200,
  response_format: { type: 'json_object' },
  messages: [
    { role: 'system', content: systemPrompt },
    { role: 'user',   content: userContent },
  ],
};

return [{ json: { body, templates, natures, openaiBody, preResolved } }];
